name: Contango Silver & Gold Inc.
business: Contango ORE, Inc. engages in exploration for gold, silver, and copper ores in Alaska. Its largest asset is a 30% membership interest in the Peak Gold JV, which operates the Manh Choh gold mine and sells gold and silver. The company also holds exploration-stage properties including Johnson Tract and Lucky Shot.

exposures.sentence: During 2025, the Peak Gold JV (on a 100% basis) processed 1,069,000 tons of ore with an average grade of 0.20 oz per ton and containing approximately 216,800 oz of gold.

catalysts.event: Dolly Varden merger expected to close
catalysts.sentence: The transaction is expected to close in late March 2026.
Contango's share of gold production from the Manh Choh mine is estimated to range from 40,000 to 45,000 oz of gold for the fiscal year 2026.
Contango's share of gold production from the Manh Choh mine is estimated to range from 75,000 to 80,000 oz of gold for the fiscal year 2027.

catalysts.event: Become fully unhedged by early delivering remaining 15,000 oz
catalysts.sentence: The Company plans to become fully unhedged in fiscal year 2026 by early delivering the remaining 15,000 oz by the end of fiscal year 2026.
The Company expects to complete the feasibility study in the first half of 2027 and make a production decision in 2027.
